name: e2e-partition-splitter
description: Static partitions expand into child tasks and aggregate output previews.

task.task: Reply exactly with the value shown under Partition input in the Partition Context. Do not inspect or modify files.

aggregate.task: If the Parallel Aggregate Context includes PARTITION_A_TOKEN and PARTITION_B_TOKEN in output previews, reply exactly E2E_PARTITION_AGGREGATE_OK. Otherwise reply exactly E2E_PARTITION_AGGREGATE_MISSING. Do not inspect or modify files.
